trained_with: RISE-style WM-rollout DiffusionNFT RL on v13/global_step_10 init (the best v13 ckpt)
v14_difference_from_v13: ckpt_path = v13/global_step_10 (instead of joint-SFT). Otherwise identical: kl_beta=1e-2, denoise=30, rollout_epoch=4, 50 steps.
eval_protocol: 496 envs (8-divisible), 240 max steps, 4 flow-matching denoise, action_cond not provided
conclusion: v14 confirms that continuing training from v13's best ckpt (87.90 success_once) drifts monotonically down, ending at 78.23 by step 50. Not even the first ckpt at step 10 (86.49) was as high as the init. So the v13/step_10 peak was an unstable lucky point on the WM-RL landscape — more RL doesn't extend it. v13/step_10 remains the global SOTA across all experiments (joint-SFT, v12, v13, v14).
